summary: Tested print settings persistence, PWA manifest, regression flows (login/session/cash payment) and frontend Impression tab. Found one CRITICAL backend bug: PUT/GET /api/settings silently drops 'auto_print_receipt' and 'open_drawer_on_cash' keys (backend code at server.py:1443-1514 only persists/returns auto_print_z, paper_width_mm, shop_name, footer_line). Frontend renders correctly, all testids present, disabled states correct when printer not connected, save toast OK, regression flows OK.

critical.issue: Print keys 'auto_print_receipt' and 'open_drawer_on_cash' are not persisted by PUT and not returned by GET. Backend server.py update_settings() (lines 1508-1514) hard-codes only {auto_print_z, paper_width_mm, shop_name, footer_line} in the saved dict; get_settings() (lines 1443-1449) mirrors the same omission. Frontend sends them but they are silently dropped. Review request explicitly requires these keys.

integration_issues.issue: UI shows toggles checked after save (because state stays in React state), but reloading would lose them because backend drops the keys. Caused by the backend bug above. Auto-print receipt + open-drawer behavior is therefore effectively non-persisted across reloads.

action_items: FIX backend server.py update_settings() to include 'auto_print_receipt' and 'open_drawer_on_cash' (bool) in the saved print dict.
FIX backend server.py get_settings() to return print.auto_print_receipt (default True) and print.open_drawer_on_cash (default True).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py update_settings (line 1508): the print payload validation is too narrow and discards keys not in the hard-coded list. Either accept the full dict from frontend or expand the allowed keys. Consider a Pydantic PrintConfig model for type-safety (analog to CurrencyConfig/SMTPConfigIn).

PrintSection.jsx uses `form.auto_print_receipt ?? true` which masks the bug visually because the toggle defaults to true even when backend returns nothing. Once backend is fixed, the value will be authoritative.

PrinterContext / OrderPage / POSPage / SessionPage should respect open_drawer_on_cash and auto_print_receipt flags from settings (out of scope for this test, but worth verifying once backend persists them).

success_rate.backend: 71% (5/7 pytest, manifest+defaults+58mm+login+cashflow PASS, auto_print_receipt+open_drawer persistence FAIL)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 12 testids render, disabled states correct, save toast OK, regression tabs OK)

seed_data_creation: None. Test fixture restores baseline print settings via PUT after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend bug confirmed via test_print_settings.py: 2/7 tests fail (test_get_settings_has_auto_print_receipt_and_drawer, test_put_settings_persists_receipt_and_drawer). Fix is small (server.py lines 1443-1449 + 1508-1514). After fix, also worth verifying via Playwright that toggling auto-print-receipt OFF, saving, then reloading the page keeps the toggle OFF. Regression flows (login 000000, table order create+pay cash, session open/close) are all green and should remain green after fix. WebUSB IS available in this Playwright Chromium build (connect-printer not disabled), so the 'WebUSB non disponible' branch was not exercised — but the code path is straightforward (else branch in PrintSection.jsx lines 70-77).
rca of the issue: RCA: server.py update_settings() at line 1508 builds the persisted print dict with a hard-coded key list that omits auto_print_receipt and open_drawer_on_cash. get_settings() at line 1443 mirrors the same omission. Reproduction: PUT /api/settings with {"print":{"auto_print_receipt":true,"open_drawer_on_cash":true}} then GET /api/settings -> print object only contains {auto_print_z, paper_width_mm, shop_name, footer_line}. Mitigation: extend both functions to handle these two boolean keys with defaults True, OR replace the dict construction with a Pydantic PrintConfig model mirrored on both read and write.
